user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Consolidated Messenger. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-14 17:34 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Consolidated Messenger territory planning

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with territory planning. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 09:12 EST
Subject: Re: Re: territory planning Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about territory planning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-22 15:32 EST
Subject: Follow-up: territory planning Review

Just checking in on the territory planning proposal. Our DevOps Lead is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: territory planning Discussion - Consolidated Messenger
Date: 2024-02-11
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft), Michelle (Consolidated Messenger)

[00:01:15] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is territory planning.

[00:06:00] Michelle (Consolidated Messenger): On the territory planning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:08:00] Michelle (Consolidated Messenger): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about integration complexity. Can we address those?

[00:12:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:15:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:17:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:21:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Consolidated Messenger: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

handoffs.condition: meeting is for account CSA should have declined

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Calendar Pre-Pack Automation template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
